title: Route
description: A single ride/route in the RoadTracker system. This is the canonical definition — both the Android and Web apps must serialize/deserialize to this exact shape when communicating with Supabase.

id.description: Client-generated unique identifier. Android uses base36 timestamp+random (e.g. 'lt9f3k2x'). Web uses crypto.randomUUID(). Both formats are valid — the column is text, not uuid.

user_id.description: The Supabase auth.uid() of the user who owns this route. Set on insert, enforced by Row Level Security.

name.description: User-facing route name. Auto-generated from date/mode if not specified.

date_ms.description: Epoch milliseconds (UTC) when the ride occurred. NOT a calendar date — store as bigint, convert to local time for display.

coordinates.description: Ordered array of points forming the route polyline. Latitude first, always.

distance_km.description: Total route distance in kilometers. Computed via Haversine formula. Always stored as km regardless of display preference.

mode.description: 'gps' = recorded via GPS tracking (phone or browser). 'manual' = drawn by hand on the map or imported from GPX.

duration_seconds.description: Ride duration in seconds. Set by GPS tracking; 0 for manual routes.

max_speed.description: Maximum speed during the ride in km/h. Captured by Android GPS; 0 for manual/web routes.

avg_speed.description: Average speed during the ride in km/h. Captured by Android GPS; 0 for manual/web routes.

max_lean_angle.description: Maximum lean angle in degrees. Captured by Android accelerometer; 0 for web routes.

max_g_force.description: Maximum g-force experienced. Captured by Android accelerometer; 0 for web routes.

elevation_gain.description: Total elevation gain in meters. Captured by Android GPS/barometer; 0 for web routes.

telemetry_json.description: Serialized JSON array of TelemetrySample objects. Empty string if no telemetry (manual routes, web routes). When non-empty, parse as JSON array of TelemetrySample.

created_at.description: Server-managed. Do not set on insert.

updated_at.description: Server-managed. Auto-updated by trigger on every UPDATE.

lat.description: Latitude in decimal degrees. ALWAYS first.

TelemetrySample.description: A single telemetry reading captured during a GPS ride. Only Android produces these.

speedKmh.description: Speed at this moment in km/h.

leanAngle.description: Lean angle in degrees at this moment.

altitude.description: Altitude in meters at this moment.
